{
  "string": "Hello, world!",
  "stringMin": "Hello",

  "stringEmail": "user@example.com",
  "stringEmoji": "😊",
  "stringUrl": "https://example.com",
  "stringUuid": "123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000",
  "stringCuid": "ck68b5x4i000123l7v9h2z1ab",
  "stringRegex": "test-value",
  "number": 42,
  "numberGt": 4,
  "numberLt": 5,
  "numberGte": 1,
  "numberLte": 1,
  "numberMultipleOf": 10,
  "numberInt": 7,
  "exampleArray": ["one", "two", "three"],
  "arrayMin": ["item"],
  "arrayMax": ["a", "b", "c"],
  "date": "2025-01-01T00:00:00.000Z",
  "dateAfter": "2024-05-01T12:00:00.000Z",
  "dateBefore": "2023-12-31T23:59:59.000Z",

  "object": { "foo": "bar", "bar": 123 },
  "objectNested": { "user": { "name": "Alice", "age": 30 } },

  "objectLoose": {},
  "nullable": null,
  "enum": "B",
  "nativeEnum": "C",
  "unionPrimitives": 100,
  "unionObjects": { "amount": 5, "inventoryItemName": "ItemA" },
  "record": { "first": "1st", "second": "2nd" },
  "recordEnumKeys": { "A": "ValueA", "B": "ValueB" },
  "default": "test"
}
